trails.name: Kapiti Island tracks and walks
trails.description: Enjoy listening to and spotting birds on walks in two areas of Kapiti Island.

trails.name: Whareroa Farm tracks
trails.description: Enjoy regenerating shrubland, coastal views and kohekohe forest on these walks that are suitable for children.

trails.name: Mataihuka Walkway
trails.description: The Mataihuka Walkway, through the Raumati Escarpment reserve is a moderate yet stunningly beautiful hike. The track starts on Waterfall Rd where there is a small roadside carpark, and winds up the hill for 10 minutes to the June Rowland lookout and picnic area before turning North and following the ridge. This is a great place to stop and catch your breath, as the track goes higher. The Bill Moxon stone cairn is around 30 minutes further up. The walk has brilliant views over Raumati and the Tasman Sea, with Kapiti Island in sight for an epic photo. The track has a gentle increase in gradient but is sure to get your blood pumping. There is no access through to Paraparaumu so return the way you came.
